cityTrivia: Once the weather turns cooler, home lighting and the rim of a cup suddenly feel more noticeable again.
trendingTopics: People are casually discussing which tiny action really counts as returning to yourself after getting home.
animeFandom: There is renewed affection for scenes where the character crosses between kitchen and room corners in a very ordinary way.

notes: Test whether a home-evening reset can still produce a concrete indoor life beat instead of a vague atmosphere scene.
